name: Trellis Tufted Area Rugs Gray - Threshold™
description:
Evoke a feeling of warmth and style in your living space with this Trellis Tufted Area Rug from Threshold™. Made from wool and featuring a trellis pattern in pale yellow on a contrasting gray, this handmade rug blends with a variety of decor styles to bring eye-catching flair to any room it's spread in. Soft underfoot, this decorative rug is designed with latex backing to prevent it from slipping, making it a great pick for high-traffic areas in your home. Plus, the low-pile construction makes cleaning a breeze.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
